infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to capture live review photos and manager plate images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is required to verify that reviews are posted on-site.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to record live review videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is required so managers can choose plate images from the gallery.
